text:
Developer Portfolio


"Build a developer portfolio with a dark black background, red accent color, hero with name and title, skills section, projects grid with cards, and a contact section"

All files are present and accounted for. ✅

---

✓ **All tasks complete**

**Pages built:**
- `Index.tsx` — Full single-page portfolio with 5 sections (Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Contact) + Footer

**Components created:**
- `Navbar` — Sticky nav with smooth-scroll anchor links, mobile hamburger drawer, "Hire Me" CTA
- `HeroSection` — Full-viewport hero with typewriter title animation, stats card, floating tech badges, social links
- `AboutSection` *(inline in Index)* — Bio, animated stats grid, and work experience timeline
- `SkillsSection` — 3-column skill category cards with animated progress bars + tech badge cloud
- `ProjectsSection` — Filterable 3-column project grid with hover overlays, live/repo links, tags
- `ContactSection` — Fully validated contact form with loading state + success screen, contact info, social links
- `SectionHeading` — Reusable section title with scroll-reveal animation
- `useScrollAnimation` — IntersectionObserver hook for scroll-triggered reveal animations

**Design highlights:**
- 🖤 Pure black (`#080808`) background with razor-sharp crimson red (`#E8182A`) accent
- 🔤 **Space Grotesk** display font + **Inter** body font
- ⚡ Grid dot background, radial glows, decorative corner brackets
- 📱 Fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop
- 🎯 Smooth scroll navigation, typewriter hero animation, animated skill bars on scroll
